title: Surveillance of campylobacteriosis (Campylobacter) - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of campylobacteriosis (Campylobacter)
Learn about campylobacteriosis surveillance.
- Number of cases of campylobacteriosis in Canada
- How Canada monitors campylobacteriosis
- For more information

## Number of cases of campylobacteriosis in Canada
Between 2011 and 2015, an average of 9,828 cases of campylobacteriosis were reported annually in Canada.
Access the national surveillance data for Canada .

## How Canada monitors campylobacteriosis
Campylobacteriosis is a nationally notifiable disease in all provinces and territories.
Cases are reported to:
- provincial or territorial departments of health
- the federal government, if they meet the national case definition
Canada uses different surveillance systems to monitor cases of food-borne illness. These include:
- the National Enteric Surveillance Program (NESP)
- the Canadian Notifiable Disease Surveillance System
